sp_widget.name: Get Support For Employee
sp_widget.option_schema: [{"name":"title","hint":"Title name of the widget","label":"Title","type":"string","default_value":"Get support"},{"name":"load_config","section":"other","default_value":"async","label":"Load configuration","type":"choice","choices":[{"label":"Synchronous","value":"sync"},{"label":"Asynchronous","value":"async"}]},{"hint":"Shows empty state if the widget content is empty.","name":"show_empty_state","section":"other","default_value":"false","label":"Show empty state","type":"boolean"}]
sp_widget.template:
GET SUPPORT

${No support content to display}
